hook: A grounded man can desire strongly without acting desperate.
body: Desire becomes attractive when it is paired with steadiness, patience, and the ability to hear no.

hook: Suppressed desire often rebounds as intensity because it has never been integrated cleanly.
body: You do not need to kill desire; you need to carry it with more discipline.

body: Being direct about wanting to see someone again can feel strong when it is not loaded with pressure or entitlement.
